Interface IuExecutable<D,R>

Type Parameters:
D - declaring type
R - result type
All Superinterfaces:
IuAnnotatedElement, IuDeclaredElement<D>, IuParameterizedElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IuConstructor<C>, IuMethod<D,R>
public interface IuExecutable<D,R> extends IuDeclaredElement<D>, IuParameterizedElement
Facade interface for an Executable element: a method or constructor.
